title: OrchestrateDASH run event v1
description: POSTed by a running agent to {endpoint_env}/api/events with an Authorization: Bearer {token_env} header. One JSON object per event; the endpoint also accepts a JSON array for batching, each item validated independently against this schema. additionalProperties is intentionally left open per the contract's additive-versioning rule.

agent.description: Must match agent.name in the manifest DASH imported for this run.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing within the run; DASH uses it to detect gaps/out-of-order delivery.

component_id.description: planned_route component id when the step maps to one; a free string when the build drifted from the plan — DASH renders unmapped ids as drift.

model.description: OpenRouter model slug when an LLM ran this step, e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6.

detail.description: Short human hint. No message bodies, no PII, no secrets — the contract's no-secrets-in-events rule.
